description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden corner cabinet designed to fit snugly into the corner of a room. The cabinet features a natural wood finish with visible grain patterns and consists of three main sections: an upper section with two glass-paned doors, a middle open shelf area with a decorative arch, and a lower section with a solid wooden door. The cabinet stands on four small feet and has a triangular back to maximize corner placement. The glass panels in the upper doors allow for display of items, while the lower compartment provides concealed storage. The overall design is rustic and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A tall, natural wood corner cabinet with glass-paned upper doors, an open middle shelf, and a solid lower door, designed for corner placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing glass-paned upper doors, open middle shelf, and solid lower door with visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow triangular profile and the depth of the cabinet, with the top and bottom edges visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned wooden back designed to fit into a corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and triangular shape.
